summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.capability; import java.util.concurrent.Callable; public class CapabilitySandbox { public static <V> V execute(ICapability capability, Callable<V> task) throws CapabilityException { long start = System.currentTimeMillis(); try { return task.call(); } catch (Exception e) { throw new CapabilityException("Capability " + capability.getCapabilityId() + " failed during execution.", e); } finally { long duration = System.currentTimeMillis() - start; } } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
